feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: yearn for sleep that won't come
entry.summary:
Author: thatsanovelidea

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 75,816Chapters: 9/10Kudos: 179

Summary: He’s been obsessed with Derek Hale ever since he moved to Beacon Hills. He used to imagine running into him at coffee shops and becoming friends and then boyfriends. No matter that Derek Hale’s reputation as "Derek Hale: sex god" had already started garnering traction by the time Stiles got to high school with him. And plus, you know, there’s the whole straight thing. But Stiles always held out some hope, because Derek wouldn’t have been the first “straight” jock on the lacrosse team to bend him over. He wouldn’t even have been the second. He would have been the third. So, there was always that little inkling of want in the back of Stiles’ mind, but it never came to fruition. Derek Hale went on to sleep with lots and lots and lots of girls and never once did he even spare a glance at Stiles or run into him at a coffee shop. And Stiles was sure, when he started at Beacon Hills University last year, that the chances were even slimmer, because this was college and there were twenty times as many students here as in high school. So, he quite confidently resigned himself to the fact that a relationship with Derek Hale would forever remain his deepest, darkest fantasy. But then six days ago, he showed up to Am Lit.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Hero Management
entry.summary:
Author: ThoseSadisticTendencies

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 78,199Chapters: 13/13Kudos: 817

Summary: Stiles gets abducted by hunters one night and subsequently tortured to draw in the valuable members of the pack. However, matters quickly go south when they discover the connection between him and Derek. Angst and darkness with a semi-happy ending.AU in that Derek doesn’t get kidnapped by Kate Argent and they don’t go to Mexico but other semi-canon stuff may occur

entry.title: Mystical Moon Roomies
entry.summary:
Author: lark_baobei

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,229Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 11

Summary: "Derek? What the hell are you doing in my room at three in the morning? Seriously, Sourwolf, this is weird even for your standards."---"No, no, no, this can't be happening again, Derek. When you realize what's going on, you're going to kill me or something worse, which wouldn't be very nice considering you're the one breaking into my house every full moon," Stiles huffed as he tried to get the wolf off him.---"Okay, we're going to have to set some rules if we're going to be mystical moon roomies. Come here, pup," and he caught him in his arms as they settled into bed, just as they had a month ago.

entry.title: He Was My Consequence
entry.summary:
Author: esmrlda99

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,043Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 6

Summary: Nerdy, shy Stiles—always buried in books and mocked for it—crosses the wrong line when she exposes campus bad boy Derek after a brutal fight. Suspended because of her, he comes back with one goal: make her life miserable. But when he catches her alone in the restricted library, secretly reading erotic novels—that’s when everything shifts. Teasing, humiliating, pushing her boundaries… until hate and tension blur into something neither of them can control, and the girl he hated becomes the one he can’t stop wanting.

entry.title: Marked with love
entry.summary:
Author: 2005Snow2012

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 793Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 14

Summary: Stiles loves Derek very much,but there´s one little thing that drives him crazy. His healing factor.No matter how hard Stiles tries to mark his mate (which he does, a lot, on multiple positions too) it never lasts longer than an hour.He really wants to mark Derek, the way Derek likes to mark him.And Stiles is mature enough to recognice that he is slightly jealous.

entry.title: Some Of Us Are Human
entry.summary:
Author: Kass_Writes

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,394Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 822

Summary: In which Stiles is kicked out of Scott’s pack and the Sheriff is tired of Scott McCall hurting his son. He calls in reinforcements and those reinforcements come to clean up the mess of Beacon Hills while also kicking some serious True Alpha ass. Scott McCall will learn one thing by the time it’s all over………………….. No one is allowed to hurt Stiles EVER.

entry.title: Same But Different
entry.summary:
Author: Reiko009

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,084Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 83

Summary: “Let me help, love.” Peter pulled away, which made Derek almost whimper at the loss of contact. The new pet name was only used when they were alone like this. Somehow the word was both too weak to describe what their coupling actually meant and a far more intimate endearment than what Derek felt that he deserved. What they were doing wasn’t love so much as need. He could sense his wolf curling protectively around what belonged to him, what anchored him, and what strengthened him as the Alpha. True, his pack was small: just him and Peter. But that was enough – for now. A spicey reimagining of Season 2. Old foes and a new threat emerge, all while the Hale wolves begin to fall for a very human high schooler with deep brown eyes and a loud mouth. Expect a lot of familiar plot points from the canon, just with a twist. Mostly an excuse to write uncle/nephew werewolf smut.

entry.title: Feral Plot Bunnies: Teen Wolf Edition
entry.summary:
Author: klutz_with_words (fandom_treasurer)

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,713Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 10

Summary: (Chapter 1)"We're not dating!" Stiles protests. He sees his Dad's Judgy Eyebrows of Doom which, unfair, Stiles is the one who has the right to do the Judgy Eyebrows because c'mon! Him and Derek??? Me throwing fix-its like whoa. Oneshots of sorts.Run-on sentences and stream-of-consciousness beware. Visit, good stranger, if you dare.Basically me throwing out all my headcanons and ideas into a bizarre mashup of a masterlist.

entry.title: SunnyDay Preschool
entry.summary:
Author: RukiaKiryu

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,677Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 58

Summary: Stiles thought he was ready for his first year of being a preschool teacher. For the tiny temper tantrums and never ending bouts of flu. The rowdy 4 year olds and overprotective parents. He prided himself at being adaptable. He was prepared! Or at least, he thought he was. He's a little less confident when his favorite three year old starts turning into a half wolf-baby just before nap time. And even less so when he finds out he's now the kid's anchor. Not to mention Eli's insanely attractive father happens to be the sweetest, kindest and most anxious alpha-werewolf in the state of California.

entry.title: A Beautiful Wreckage
entry.summary:
Author: sensingowls

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,959Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 28

Summary: Stiles hasn't been back to Beacon Hills in years, but when he senses Something is Up, he makes the decision to go back to help out. Filled with anxiety, he heads back to the trauma filled nightmare that is his hometown, ready to protect his pack, the love of his life and his son.This fic takes huge liberties with the plot of the movie, featuring Sterek who are idiots in love, a magical, BAMF Stiles, and a demon masquerading as the Nogitsune.

entry.title: Rising With the Heat Above
entry.summary:
Author: evvrythingisawesome

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,826Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 6

Summary: Sheriff Stilinski recovers from his injury and tries to keep the pack together in the absence of their Alpha; Chris Argent struggles with guilt over his role in the pack's recent troubles; Teal'c tries to balance his responsibilities to the pack with his obligations to the Free Jaffa Nation and the SGC; Daniel Jackson supports Derek through his quest for the truth of his lost Hale ancestor and his search for his sister.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Seeing the beauty (through the pain)
entry.summary:
Author: FelintoGirl

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 114,314Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 1,148

Summary: Stiles knew who his Alpha was, and he would do everything to protect the Hale family legacy until his return. Even if it meant going against his brother.

entry.title: clinging on tight
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,578Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 100

Summary: It’s dark in the basement. The only light source is a tiny window high up on the wall. It’s also freezing, like no warmth has ever touched the air. The energy feels dead, haunting, tainted by violence and blood and despair, like even if a ray of sun managed to sneak in through the window, it would hardly make a difference. Stiles shivers where he’s curled up in the corner, the furthest place from the stairs. He wraps his red hoodie tighter around himself, but it’s not doing much good anymore, damp from old blood and tattered in too many places. His jeans feel stiff and restrictive on his body. Beside him, a large black wolf whimpers, the mournful sound leaving his mouth and echoing around the otherwise silent basement. Stiles looks over, his hand already buried in the wolf’s fur, also matted with blood.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski
  • Derek Hale
  • Stiles Stilinski
